shortDescription: Modern 1-bedroom suite in Deer Park with premium finishes and full building amenities.
fullDescription: Welcome to 1 St. Clair Avenue West, Unit 1204 in the vibrant Deer Park neighbourhood. This well-appointed condominium suite delivers effortless urban living with premium amenities. The main living area showcases original architectural details alongside tasteful modern updates. The kitchen has been fully renovated with soft-close cabinetry, stone counters, and a breakfast bar. The 1 bedrooms are well-proportioned, with the primary suite featuring a walk-in closet and updated ensuite. The finished lower level adds valuable living space with a recreation room, extra bathroom, and storage. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: Surrounded by cafes, galleries, and boutiques
Cosy living room with gas fireplace
